commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6d8a2a313faff6e41a9c64fb943148a7f4fee93b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR trims the packaged root changelog to one current release section, updates release/changelog skills and appcast link text, adds a changelog shape guard with tests, and adds `changelog-plan.md`.

PR surface: Tests +187, Docs -11821, Other +140. Total -11494 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes for the PR finding: source inspection plus a direct regex/awk probe shows the new guard accepts a heading that the release workflow extracts as empty.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The protected `maintainer` label, release-owned changelog policy, and package-history behavior need maintainer handling; the line-level guard mismatch is concrete but sits inside that release decision.

target.title: feat: per-version package changelog
target.body:
## Summary

- Make the root `CHANGELOG.md` package-visible release notes per-version instead of cumulative history.
- Update release/changelog agent instructions so `/changelog` rewrites the file as one stable-base `## YYYY.M.D` section only, with no `## Unreleased` or beta-specific headings.
- Extend the changelog attribution check into a shape guard and update tests, while keeping `CHANGELOG.md` in the root package files.
- Rename appcast release-note footer text from “View full changelog” to “View release notes”.
- Move the implementation plan into this branch as `changelog-plan.md`; removed the sibling checkout copy before committing here.

## Verification

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/package-acceptance-workflow.test.ts` passed: 30 tests.
- `node scripts/check-changelog-attributions.mjs CHANGELOG.md`
- `node --check scripts/check-changelog-attributions.mjs`
- Direct Node assertions for the new per-version changelog guard passed.
- Direct Node assertions for the changelog skill/runbook prompt contract passed.
- `git diff --check`
- `npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts` confirmed `CHANGELOG.md` remains packaged at 6,417 bytes; package dry-run size was 2,198,201 bytes compressed and 7,531,847 bytes unpacked.
- `$autoreview --mode local` reported clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- cmux Codex sanity-check agent in the same workspace reviewed the skill usage path; it found a section-order wording mismatch and a guard-coverage gap, both addressed before commit.

## Notes

The focused `test/scripts/check-changelog-attributions.test.ts` Vitest file initially passed before the later no-`Unreleased` decision. Subsequent reruns of that full file repeatedly spun without output in this local worktree, so I stopped the stuck processes and covered the final guard behavior with direct Node assertions plus the script-level `CHANGELOG.md` check above.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
